data.raceName: PUMPERS WEAR PARTS F&M BM 64 HANDICAP
data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. FINE WINE scored fresh-up two runs back over 1000m then failed to fire last start when finishing ninth of 12 over 1000m at Gosford. Better than that last run would suggest and has top-three claims. 4. MISS CAPITALE finished a nose second of six over 1200m at Newcastle when trying to lead all of the way. Racing well this prep and should prove hard to catch. 5. MY PROCLAMA went forward early from her wide draw last start over 1300m at Hawkesbury only to fade late, finishing eighth of 10. Drops back in distance and has solid top-three claims. 8. SHOUTABOUTIT battled on well to finish third of eight last time out over 1200m at Gosford after leading into the turn. Trained here and is well worth a second look.","runners":[2,4,5,8],"exclusive":true}
